loyaltyMetaDescription: Member loyalty overview, discovery, and business detail surfaces.
publicAuthReturnCartStateEmpty: No active cart is currently available.
publicAuthReturnAccountDescription: After sign-in or registration, you can continue into your account overview.
publicAuthReturnCheckoutDescription: After the account step, you can continue checkout with the current cart.
publicAuthReturnCartDescription: After the account step, you can review the cart and continue toward checkout.
publicAuthReturnOrdersDescription: After signing in, you can continue to your order history.
publicAuthReturnInvoicesDescription: After signing in, you can continue to your invoices.
publicAuthReturnLoyaltyDescription: After signing in, you can continue to loyalty benefits and businesses.
publicAuthReturnGenericDescription: After the account step, you can continue where you left off.
registerDescription: Create an account to manage orders, invoices, addresses, and loyalty benefits.
registrationSubmittedMessage: The account was created. Check the email confirmation flow before expecting sign-in to succeed.
activationDescription: Request another confirmation email or complete email confirmation with the token you received.
activationRequestedMessage: If the account exists, an activation email has been requested.
activationConfirmedMessage: The email confirmation request completed successfully. Browser sign-in is still a separate session decision.
activationRecoveryDescription: Request another confirmation email here or continue into the activation form.
activationEmailRequiredMessage: Email is required to request confirmation.
activationRequestFailedMessage: Activation email could not be requested.
activationEmailTokenRequiredMessage: Email and token are both required to confirm the account.
activationConfirmFailedMessage: Email confirmation could not be completed.
passwordRecoveryTitle: Request or complete a password reset
passwordRecoveryDescription: Request a reset email or complete password reset with the token you received.
passwordRequestedMessage: If the account exists, a password reset email has been requested.
passwordResetMessage: The password reset completed successfully. Browser sign-in remains a separate session decision.
passwordRequestEmailRequiredMessage: Email is required to request a password reset.
passwordRequestFailedMessage: Password reset request could not be completed.
passwordResetFieldsRequiredMessage: Email, token, and new password are required.
signInDescription: Sign in to manage your account, orders, invoices, addresses, and loyalty benefits.
memberSessionUnauthorizedMessage: Please sign in again to continue.
memberResourceNotFoundMessage: The requested account information is not available.
memberDataWarningsTitle: Some account data is temporarily unavailable.
memberDataWarningsMessage: Please try again later if anything looks incomplete.
memberDashboardDescription: This dashboard reads the authenticated member profile surfaces through the new web-owned browser session layer.
profileUnavailable: Profile data is not currently available for this member session.
preferencesUnavailable: Preference data is not currently available for this member session.
portalRoutesDescription: Use these links to manage your account, orders, invoices, addresses, and loyalty benefits.
ordersPortalNote: Review recent orders, payment state, shipment progress, and linked invoices from your account.
invoicesPortalNote: Review invoices, balances, due dates, and payment actions from your account.
orderDetailPortalNote: Review order lines, payment status, shipment updates, and linked invoices.
invoiceDetailPortalNote: Review invoice lines, balance, payment status, and linked order information.
loyaltyPortalNote: Review points, rewards, participating businesses, and recent loyalty activity.
dashboardCommunicationPanelMessage: Review your contact details and marketing preferences from one place.
checkoutLaunchMessage: Use a saved address to prefill checkout.
dashboardActionCenterMessage: Review the most useful account actions in one place.
dashboardActionCenterEmptyMessage: No urgent dashboard actions are currently derived from the current member snapshots.
dashboardActionCartDescription: {count} cart items are active with a total of {total}. Continue shopping or move to checkout.
dashboardActionPhoneDescription: Verify your phone number to improve account security and communication.
dashboardActionSecurityDescription: Manage password and sign-in settings from the security page.
dashboardActionSecurityInvalidSessionDes: Check password and session settings from the security page.
dashboardActionAddressDescription: Add a saved address to speed up checkout.
dashboardActionInvoiceDescription: A recent invoice still has an outstanding balance of {value}. Open the invoice to continue payment.
dashboardActionLoyaltyDescription: {business} is closest to the next reward. {points} more points are currently needed for the next unlock.
dashboardSecurityPanelMessage: Review phone verification and session access from your account.
dashboardCommercePanelMessage: Review recent orders and invoices from your account.
dashboardCommerceSummaryMessage: You have {orderCount} active orders totaling {orderValue} and {invoiceCount} open invoices totaling {invoiceBalance}.
dashboardRecentOrdersEmptyMessage: No recent orders are currently available.
dashboardRecentInvoicesEmptyMessage: No recent invoices are currently available.
dashboardLoyaltyPanelMessage: Review joined businesses and reward progress from your account.
dashboardJoinedPlacesEmptyMessage: No joined loyalty places are currently available.
dashboardRewardFocusEmptyMessage: No next reward is currently available.
noProfileEditMessage: No profile snapshot is currently available for editing.
boundaryProfileMessage: Email remains display-only here. You can update the editable profile fields below.
memberPaymentHandoffMissingUrlMessage: Hosted checkout URL was not returned.
profileRequiredFieldsMessage: Profile update is missing required fields.
preferencesRowVersionRequiredMessage: Preference update requires a row version.
phoneAlreadyVerifiedMessage: This member profile is already marked as phone-number confirmed.
phoneCodeRequestedMessage: A phone verification code should arrive through the selected channel.
phoneVerifiedMessage: The verification code was accepted and the member profile should now reflect a confirmed phone number.
phoneMissingForVerificationMessage: Save a phone number on the profile first before requesting a verification code.
phoneVerificationUnavailable: Phone verification becomes available once the member profile can be loaded.
memberPreferencesIntroMessage: Choose how you want to receive marketing and service communication from your account.
noPreferencesEditMessage: No preference snapshot is currently available for editing.
preferencesEmailChannelReadyMessage: Email delivery can use {email} when email marketing is enabled.
preferencesEmailChannelUnavailableMessag: No usable email address is currently available on your profile.
preferencesSmsChannelVerificationMessage: Verify your phone number before SMS preferences are fully ready.
preferencesSmsChannelUnavailableMessage: No verified phone channel is currently available for SMS preference follow-up.
preferencesWhatsAppChannelVerificationMe: Verify your phone number before WhatsApp preferences are fully ready.
preferencesWhatsAppChannelUnavailableMes: No verified phone channel is currently available for WhatsApp preference follow-up.
memberSecurityIntroMessage: Update your password and review account security.
securityRequiredFieldsMessage: Current password, new password, and confirmation are required.
securityConfirmMismatchMessage: The new password and confirmation must match.
memberAddressesIntroMessage: Save shipping and billing addresses so checkout can be completed faster.
addressUpdateIdentifiersMessage: Address update requires id and row version.
addressDeleteIdentifiersMessage: Address delete requires id and row version.
noSavedAddressesMessage: No saved addresses are currently available for this member.
loyaltyOverviewTitleSignedIn: Loyalty overview now spans joined businesses and public discovery
loyaltyOverviewTitleSignedOut: Loyalty discovery is available before a member joins
loyaltyOverviewDescriptionSignedIn: Joined-business dashboards still come from the authenticated member contracts, while discovery and pre-join business context now come from the public business contracts.
loyaltyOverviewDescriptionSignedOut: Anonymous visitors can browse loyalty-ready businesses first, then sign in only when they want to join a program or access member-only balance and history screens.
myLoyaltyPlacesDescription: Business-aware cards now come from the joined-loyalty places contract instead of only relying on aggregate account stats.
noJoinedLoyaltyPlacesMessage: No joined loyalty places were returned for this page.
noLoyaltyOverviewMessage: No loyalty overview could be loaded for the current member session.
memberOnlySurfacesDescription: Balances, joined-business dashboards, rewards history, promotions, orders, and invoices still require member sign-in.
publicBusinessDetailFallback: Business details are available for loyalty discovery and pre-join review.
loyaltyMembershipCreatedMessage: You joined this loyalty program. Reload the page to see your member details.
noActiveLoyaltyProgramMessage: No active public loyalty program was returned for this business.
noPublicRewardTiersMessage: No public reward tiers are currently published for this business.
noPublicContactMetadataMessage: No public contact details are available for this business.
noPublicBranchListMessage: No public branch list is currently available for this business.
joinGuidanceAuthenticated: Join this loyalty program from this page and start collecting points with this business.
joinGuidanceAnonymous: Sign in or create an account to join this loyalty program.
joinGuidanceAccountNote: Your points and rewards will appear in your account after you join.
discoveryDescriptionSignedIn: The joined-business list remains member-specific, but discovery now stays visible so the portal can also act as a growth surface for the next place the customer wants to join.
discoveryDescriptionSignedOut: Browse participating businesses and reward tiers before signing in.
joinWithoutBranchSelection: Join without selecting a preferred branch
mapPreviewUnavailableMessage: No map-ready businesses are available for the current results.
proximityModeMessage: Results can use latitude, longitude, and radius when provided.
publicBusinessDetailCardFallback: Public business detail is available for this loyalty place.
noDiscoveryMatchesMessage: No loyalty-ready businesses matched the current filters.
loyaltyDetailUnavailableCustomerMessage: Some loyalty details are temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
promotionTrackingFailedMessage: Promotion interaction could not be recorded.
scanPreparedMessage: A short-lived scan token is ready for this business.
scanClearedMessage: The prepared scan session was cleared.
loyaltyJoinFailedMessage: Loyalty enrollment could not be completed.
scanRewardSelectionRequiredMessage: Choose at least one reward before preparing a redemption scan.
scanPrepareFailedMessage: Scan session could not be prepared.
noBusinessDashboardMessage: Business loyalty details could not be loaded right now.
pointsNeededNextRewardMessage: {value} more points needed to unlock the next reward.
noAdditionalRewardThresholdMessage: No additional reward threshold is currently published for this account.
pointExpiryInactiveMessage: Point expiry tracking is not currently active for this loyalty program.
browserScanPrepDescription: Prepare a short-lived scan token for in-store accrual or redemption.
accrualModeDescription: Prepare a scan that earns points during checkout or an in-store visit.
redemptionModeDescription: Prepare a scan for spending points on one or more currently redeemable rewards.
noRedeemableRewardsMessage: No redeemable rewards are currently available. You can still prepare an accrual scan.
scanTokenNote: Show this QR code in store before it expires. Clear it when you no longer need it.
noActiveScanTokenMessage: No active scan token exists for this business yet.
noPublishedRewardsMessage: No published rewards are currently available for this business.
promotionsDescription: Personalized promotion cards available for this business.
noPromotionCardsMessage: No promotion cards are currently available for this business.
unifiedTimelineDescription: Recent loyalty events across points transactions and reward redemptions.
noTimelineEntriesMessage: No recent loyalty timeline entries are currently available for this business.
noRecentTransactionsMessage: No recent transactions are currently available for this business.
ordersAuthRequiredTitle: Member sign-in is required for order history.
ordersAuthRequiredMessage: Sign in to view your orders.
orderDetailAuthRequiredTitle: Member sign-in is required for order detail.
orderDetailAuthRequiredMessage: Sign in to view this order.
profileAuthRequiredTitle: Member sign-in is required for profile editing.
profileAuthRequiredMessage: Profile editing now lives behind the authenticated member portal.
preferencesAuthRequiredTitle: Member sign-in is required for preference editing.
preferencesAuthRequiredMessage: Member preferences now live behind the authenticated portal.
securityAuthRequiredTitle: Member sign-in is required for password changes.
securityAuthRequiredMessage: Authenticated password changes now live behind the member portal instead of the public recovery flow.
addressesAuthRequiredTitle: Member sign-in is required for address management.
addressesAuthRequiredMessage: Reusable addresses now live behind the authenticated portal.
invoicesAuthRequiredTitle: Member sign-in is required for invoice history.
invoicesAuthRequiredMessage: Sign in to view your invoices.
invoiceDetailAuthRequiredTitle: Member sign-in is required for invoice detail.
invoiceDetailAuthRequiredMessage: Sign in to view this invoice.
ordersTitle: Order history now reads from the authenticated member portal surface
ordersWarningsMessage: The member orders endpoint returned status "{status}".
ordersFilterEmptyMessage: No orders match the current filters. Adjust search or status to widen the history list.
noOrdersMessage: No member orders were returned for this history page.
orderDetailUnavailableCustomerMessage: We could not load this order. Please try again later or return to your orders.
noOrderPaymentsMessage: No payment attempts are attached to this order yet.
noShipmentsMessage: No shipment snapshots are currently attached to this order.
linkedInvoicesDescription: Order-linked invoice snapshots now come directly from the member order detail contract.
noLinkedInvoicesMessage: No linked invoices are currently attached to this order.
invoicesTitle: Invoice history now reads from the authenticated member billing surface
invoicesWarningsMessage: The member invoices endpoint returned status "{status}".
invoicesFilterEmptyMessage: No invoices match the current filters. Adjust search or status to widen the billing list.
noInvoicesMessage: No invoices are available for this page.
invoiceDetailUnavailableCustomerMessage: We could not load this invoice. Please try again later or return to your invoices.
paymentSummaryDescription: Review the invoice balance, due date, payment status, and document link.
